de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init

Class WellDefinednessPO.Variables

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.init.WellDefinednessPO.Variables
  • Enclosing class:
    WellDefinednessPO

    public static class WellDefinednessPO.Variables
extends Object
    A static data structure for storing and passing the variables used in the actual proof. This includes a self variable, a result variable, an exception variable, a mapping of heaps to the according preconditions, a list of parameter variables, a base heap, a heap for the pre-state and an anonymous heap.
    Author:
    Michael Kirsten
